stemHtml: What does the International Air Services Transit Agreement deal with?

options.a: Free and unhindered transit of aeroplanes over the high seas.
options.b: The freedom for aeroplanes to fly over the territory of any other State without landing.
options.c: The carriage of traffic between the state of registration of the aircraft and any other participating state.
options.d: The freedom for aeroplanes of one State to land in the territory of another State for the purpose of refuelling.
